willing_to_use_reason: The application offers sophisticated synthesis controls, but the current UI suffers from significant layout glitches and character rendering issues.
first_impression: A technical and dense audio application that prioritizes metadata display over visual hierarchy and white space.
unclear: The function of the empty checkboxes next to the song titles in the main list
Whether 'cache 0/103' refers to file loading progress, metadata indexing, or something else
The interaction difference between the 'rescan files' and 'rescan dev' buttons
improvements: Fix the font rendering bug in the output device dropdown where device names appear as empty square boxes
Align the song metadata (era, license, instrument) into fixed-width columns to prevent the current jagged visual layout
Center the volume and pan numeric inputs vertically with their corresponding sliders in the footer mixer
blockers: Encoding errors in the output dropdown make it impossible to correctly identify and select audio output hardware
